overview: A modern, elegant, and fully responsive cafe website for Brew Haven — a warm, cozy coffee shop. Features earthy earth-tone design, dark mode, smooth animations, menu browsing, table reservations, and a contact page.
features: Earthy warm color palette with dark mode toggle
Hero section with headline and call-to-action buttons
Featured menu items, customer testimonials, and photo gallery
Full menu with 5 categories in clean card layout
Contact form with address and opening hours
Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
